service.name: Idabus API
service.description: REST API for accessing Idabus resources

endpoints.name: get-resource-by-id
endpoints.description: Gets the resource with the given id.

path_parameters.name: id
path_parameters.description: The object ID of the resource to fetch.

query_parameters.name: SimulationSessionId
query_parameters.description: The ID of the simulation session.

query_parameters.name: SimulationActorId
query_parameters.description: An optional object ID of the simulated actor. The logged in user is taken if not specified.

endpoints.response_description: Returns the requested resource as a JSON object. Returns 404 if not found.

endpoints.name: get-resource-by-xpath
endpoints.description: Searches for resources via an XPath query based on a search specification.

query_parameters.name: xPathQuery
query_parameters.description: The XPath string.

query_parameters.name: SimulationSessionId
query_parameters.description: The ID of the simulation session.

query_parameters.name: SimulationActorId
query_parameters.description: An optional object ID of the simulated actor. The logged in user is taken if not specified.

request_body.description: The configuration parameter for this search.

endpoints.response_description: Returns a paged list of matching resources, including an optional continuation token and total count.

endpoints.name: create-resource

query_parameters.name: Attributes
query_parameters.description: An optional list of attribute names that should be included in the resource ("objectid" and "objecttype" are always included). If null, all non-computed attributes are included. If this is ["*"], all attributes including computed ones are included.

query_parameters.name: ResolveReferences
query_parameters.description: An optional list of ResolveReferenceSpecification objects specifying references to be resolved.

query_parameters.name: QueryFormat
query_parameters.description: Determines if null values should be returned for the selected attributes.

query_parameters.name: IncludeEventArchive
query_parameters.description: Indicates if the event archive should be consulted to fetch this item.

query_parameters.name: comment
query_parameters.description: An optional comment for the request. May be required for approvals.

query_parameters.name: skipInvalidReferences
query_parameters.description: If true, invalid references are skipped instead of failing the request.

query_parameters.name: SimulationSessionId
query_parameters.description: The ID of the simulation session.

query_parameters.name: SimulationActorId
query_parameters.description: An optional object ID of the simulated actor. The logged in user is taken if not specified.

request_body.description: The resource to be created. If the resource contains no object ID, a fresh ID is generated automatically. If the prefix of the object ID does not match the object type, it is corrected accordingly.

endpoints.response_description: Returns the created resource with attributes depending on the provided options. May also return 202 Accepted, 400 Bad Request, or 409 Conflict.

endpoints.name: update-resource
endpoints.description: Updates the resource with the given id.

path_parameters.name: id
path_parameters.description: The ID of the resource to be updated.

query_parameters.name: comment
query_parameters.description: An optional comment for the request. May be required for approvals.

query_parameters.name: skipInvalidReferences
query_parameters.description: If true, invalid references are skipped instead of failing the request.

query_parameters.name: SimulationSessionId
query_parameters.description: The ID of the simulation session.

query_parameters.name: SimulationActorId
query_parameters.description: An optional object ID of the simulated actor. The logged in user is taken if not specified.

request_body.description: The updates specified as attribute/value assignments.

endpoints.response_description: Returns 200 OK on success. May also return 202 Accepted or 400 Bad Request.

endpoints.name: delete-resource

path_parameters.name: id
path_parameters.description: The ID of the resource to be deleted.

query_parameters.name: comment
query_parameters.description: An optional comment for the request. May be required for approvals.

query_parameters.name: SimulationSessionId
query_parameters.description: The ID of the simulation session.

query_parameters.name: SimulationActorId
query_parameters.description: An optional object ID of the simulated actor. The logged in user is taken if not specified.

endpoints.response_description: Returns a boolean indicating if the resource existed and was successfully deleted. May also return 202 Accepted.
